visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with long, dark, disheveled hair and a distressed expression. He is wearing a dark, ornate, high-collared jacket. He is surrounded by a crowd of people in a dimly lit, dark environment. The people around him are out of focus, but their somber and serious faces are visible. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is present. The camera remains steady, emphasizing the man's emotional state. The audio is filled with a low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score that creates a sense of dread and anticipation. The deep, resonant tones of the music echo slightly, suggesting a large, cavernous space. The scene cuts to a medium shot of a young man standing in a dark, stone-walled corridor. He wears a patterned sweater over a collared shirt. His expression is one of concern and apprehension as he looks slightly off-camera. The corridor is dimly lit, with arched stone structures on either side. The same "风行网" watermark is visible in the top right corner.
